title: Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division - Bank of Canada
content:
## Subscribe to Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division
- Matías Vieyra Matías Vieyra is a Senior Economist in the Canadian Economic Analysis Department at the Bank of Canada. Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis , Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division Research Field(s) : Banking , Business Cycles , Housing , Macroeconomic Theory , Monetary and Fiscal Policy , Monetary Economics , Pricing Behaviour , Quantitative Macroeconomics
